result.stdout:
1.0.23

A collection of utilities to interact with Azure

Usage: azutilites [options] [command]

Options:
  -v|--version  Show version information
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  configure     Set defaults for the command
  deployments   Set of utility functions to manage the deployments in a resource group

Run 'azutilites [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Set of utility functions to manage the deployments in a resource group

Usage: azutilites deployments [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  clean         Clean deployment from deployment history from the resource groups
  count         Get the count of deployment currently in the resource group

Run 'deployments [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Set of utility functions to manage the deployments in a resource group

Usage: azutilites deployments [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  clean         Clean deployment from deployment history from the resource groups
  count         Get the count of deployment currently in the resource group

Run 'deployments [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Clean deployment from deployment history from the resource groups

Usage: azutilites deployments clean [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                         Show help information
  -r|--resource-group                  Name of the resource group from which the deployments to be cleaned. You can specify this flag multiple times for multiple resource groups.
  -d|--days-to-keep <DAYS_TO_KEEP>     Anything older than this value here will be deleted. Default is 30 days.
  -ci|--client-id <CLIENT_ID>          Client Id
  -cs|--client-secret <CLIENT_SECRET>  Client secret
  -t|--tenant-id <TENANT_ID>           Tenant Id
  -s|--subscription <NAME>             Subscription Id

  -ci|--client-id <CLIENT_ID>          Client Id

Get the count of deployment currently in the resource group

Usage: azutilites deployments count [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                          Show help information
  -r|--resource-group <RESOURCE_GROUP>  Name of the resource group
  -d|--days-to-keep <DAYS_TO_KEEP>      Anything older than this value here will be deleted. Default is 30 days.
  -ci|--client-id <CLIENT_ID>           Client Id
  -cs|--client-secret <CLIENT_SECRET>   Client secret
  -t|--tenant-id <TENANT_ID>            Tenant Id
  -s|--subscription <NAME>              Subscription Id
